title: Thaumic Recipe Tweaker UI
description: The editor for Thaumic Recipe Tweaker (EXPERIMENTAL)
body:
THIS PROJECT IS EXPERIMENTAL AND WILL NOT RECIVE ANY MORE UPDATES FOR THE TIME BEING.
Do not DM me with problems. I will not fix them.

IMPORTANT: Do not change the name of this file, or the UI will not load correctly

## Features:

This mod will allow you to EDIT / ADD any recipe you want with ease. (Possible crashes, as this project is buggy) This mod will load all the items, aspects, recipes, and researches from other mods. You should be able to see these things in the UI, so add whatever mod you would like. This UI is only compatible with vanilla Minecraft recipes and Thaumcraft recipes. Ex, Shaped crafting table recipe. Ex, Arcane recipe. 

The thaumicrecipe folder, where all the important files are stored, is located in the config folder of the Minecraft instance.

This UI will not run as a standalone mod. You MUST have the [Thaumic Recipe Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic-recipe-tweaker) mod installed alongside it.

The UI was built on JavaFx 8. See the source for a more detailed look into how the Ui works, and other code bits
